headline: QQQ Isn’t the Only Game in Town. Competition Heats Up for Nasdaq-100 ETFs.
summary: State Street is challenging Invesco with its newly launched Nasdaq-100 exchange-traded fund. BlackRock is poised to join the fray.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Invesco, Raises Price Target to $29
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $28 to $29.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.
